# API Integration And Contract Plan

## Endpoint Catalog

| ID | Item | Priority |
|---|---|---|
| CONTRACT-001 | POST /api/public/elevenlabs/scribe-token | P0 |
| CONTRACT-008 | POST /api/rag/upload | P1 |

## Global API Rules > Authentication

All protected endpoints require a valid JWT. Unauthenticated requests return 401 with a standard error shape { error: { code, message } }.
